description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.1 Docker image and caches the vendor/ directory. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y nodejs, and bundle install --path vendor. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public/, publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, and deploys the site to GitLab Pages on every pipeline run.
